# ZIVO

> ZIVO is a free all-in-one super-app combining travel booking (flights, hotels, car rentals), rides and food delivery, social feed and short-form video (reels), creator subscriptions and live streaming, online shop and POS, jobs board for hiring and applying, plus chat with voice and video calls — one account for everything. Available on iOS, Android, and the web at hizivo.com.

ZIVO is operated by ZIVO LLC and is a booking agent (not the merchant of record) for airline tickets. The product (web app, iOS app, Android app) lives at hizivo.com. The parent company website for ZIVO LLC is zivollc.com — both domains belong to the same company and share the same brand. Core features are free; some premium features and creator subscriptions are paid. Languages supported: English, Khmer, Arabic, French. ZIVO partners with 500+ travel providers including Booking.com, Expedia, Hotels.com, Hertz, Enterprise, and Avis, and offers direct NDC pricing from 300+ airlines.

## Get the app

- [Install ZIVO](https://hizivo.com/install): Download ZIVO on iOS, Android, or use it as a web app — one account, every feature.
- [iOS App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/id6759480121)
- [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zivo.app)

## Core services

- [Flights](https://hizivo.com/flights): Compare flights from 500+ airlines worldwide. No booking fees.
- [Hotels](https://hizivo.com/hotels): Compare hotel prices from 500+ trusted partners.
- [Car rental](https://hizivo.com/rent-car): Compare rental car prices from Hertz, Enterprise, Avis and more.
- [Rides](https://hizivo.com/rides): Book rides on demand.
- [Eats](https://hizivo.com/eats): Order food delivery from local restaurants.
- [Grocery](https://hizivo.com/grocery): Order groceries for delivery.
- [Travel insurance](https://hizivo.com/travel-insurance): Coverage for trips booked on ZIVO.
- [AI trip planner](https://hizivo.com/ai-trip-planner): AI-built itineraries for any destination.
- [Business travel](https://hizivo.com/business-travel): Booking, expenses, and policies for teams.
- [Multi-city builder](https://hizivo.com/multi-city-builder): Plan complex multi-stop trips in one search.
- [Concierge](https://hizivo.com/concierge): Personal concierge for premium travelers.
- [Auto repair](https://hizivo.com/auto-repair): Book mobile and shop auto repair.
- [Package delivery](https://hizivo.com/package-delivery): Send packages locally with on-demand drivers.
- [Move](https://hizivo.com/move): Book movers for small and full-home moves.

## Social & creators

- [Feed](https://hizivo.com/feed): Personalized social feed of posts and updates.
- [Reels](https://hizivo.com/reels): Short-form video reels from creators worldwide.
- [Creators](https://hizivo.com/creators): Discover creators and subscribe to fan content.
- [Channels](https://hizivo.com/channels): Themed channels across topics.
- [Communities](https://hizivo.com/communities): Group discussions and shared interests.
- [Trending](https://hizivo.com/trending): Currently trending posts, topics, and creators.
- [Explore](https://hizivo.com/explore): Discovery hub for content, places, and people.
- [Leaderboard](https://hizivo.com/leaderboard): Top creators and contributors.
- [Live](https://hizivo.com/live): Live streams from creators on ZIVO.
- [Watch party](https://hizivo.com/watch-party): Watch videos together with friends in real time.
- [Podcasts](https://hizivo.com/podcasts): Browse and listen to podcasts on ZIVO.
- [Events](https://hizivo.com/events): Discover and book local events.
- [Experiences](https://hizivo.com/experiences): Tours, classes, and curated experiences worldwide.
- [Places](https://hizivo.com/places): Discover places to eat, stay, and visit.
- [Dating](https://hizivo.com/dating): Meet new people on ZIVO Dating.
- [Wellness](https://hizivo.com/wellness): Mindfulness, nutrition, and meds tracking.
- [Sounds](https://hizivo.com/sounds): Library of sounds and music for reels.
- [Link hub](https://hizivo.com/link-hub): Personal link-in-bio page for creators.

## Commerce & business

- [Shop](https://hizivo.com/shop): Online marketplace for stores selling on ZIVO.
- [Marketplace](https://hizivo.com/marketplace): Cross-vertical marketplace for ZIVO sellers.
- [Jobs](https://hizivo.com/jobs): Job board for posting roles and applying.
- [Business](https://hizivo.com/business): Tools for merchants — POS, online shop, jobs.
- [Monetization](https://hizivo.com/monetization): Creator monetization — subscriptions, tips, ads.
- [Digital products](https://hizivo.com/digital-products): Sell digital downloads and content.
- [Brand deals](https://hizivo.com/brand-deals): Match creators with brand partnership offers.
- [Promote](https://hizivo.com/promote): Promote your posts, shop, or jobs.
- [Partners](https://hizivo.com/partners): Travel and commerce partner program.
- [Become a partner](https://hizivo.com/partner-with-zivo): Apply to partner with ZIVO.
- [Affiliate hub](https://hizivo.com/affiliate-hub): Affiliate program tools and earnings.
- [API partners](https://hizivo.com/api-partners): Integration partners and APIs.
- [Developers](https://hizivo.com/developers): Developer docs and APIs for ZIVO integrations.
- [Enterprise ready](https://hizivo.com/enterprise-ready): Enterprise features and security overview.
- [Connect website](https://hizivo.com/connect-website): Sync your existing website with a ZIVO storefront.
- [Affiliate program](https://hizivo.com/affiliate-disclosure): Affiliate disclosures and program info.

- [ZIVO LLC corporate site](https://zivollc.com): Parent company website for ZIVO LLC, the company behind the ZIVO super-app.
- [About](https://hizivo.com/about): Company background and mission.
- [How it works](https://hizivo.com/how-it-works): How ZIVO works for travelers, creators, and merchants.
- [FAQ](https://hizivo.com/faq): Frequently asked questions.
- [Help](https://hizivo.com/help): Help center.
- [Contact](https://hizivo.com/contact): Contact ZIVO support — support@hizivo.com / info@hizivo.com.
- [Careers](https://hizivo.com/careers): Job openings at ZIVO.
- [Press](https://hizivo.com/press): Press kit and media contacts.
- [Vision](https://hizivo.com/vision): ZIVO's product vision and roadmap context.
- [Trust statement](https://hizivo.com/trust-statement): Trust, safety, and reliability commitments.

## Travel guides

- [Cheap flights guide](https://hizivo.com/guides/cheap-flights): Tips for finding low fares.
- [Best time to book](https://hizivo.com/guides/best-time-to-book): When to book flights for best prices.
- [Deals](https://hizivo.com/deals): Current travel and shopping deals.

- [Accessibility](https://hizivo.com/legal/accessibility): Accessibility statement.
- [Seller of travel](https://hizivo.com/legal/seller-of-travel): US seller-of-travel registrations and disclosures.
